description: Style NoteWith the bold prints on this classic graphic tee, adidas brings in sport style with a bang this Summer. A sharp add to an off-duty wardrobe, balance this T-shirt with tailored shorts or fitted denim trousers. An effortless way to infuse a sport-inspired lifestyle into your everyday wear, this tee is worth the buy, especially because it's from one of our favourite sportswear brand Adidas!Product DetailsPurple round neck T-shirt, has a ribbed neckline, short sleeves and print on the frontMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with like coloursWarm ironDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
